zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强，短线维持上行格局
zh.content:
当前以太坊报1785.38美元，24小时微跌0.10%，整体仍保持高位震荡。价格运行于20日均线1771.22美元上方，说明中短期多头结构尚未破坏，市场仍以震荡偏强思路为主，但上涨动能有所放缓。

从技术指标来看，MACD数值为13.44，维持正值，显示多头动能仍占优势，但由于Signal及RSI数据暂缺，趋势确认力度有所不足。目前价格逼近日内高点1787.18美元附近，若放量突破，有望进一步打开上行空间。

短线支撑首先关注1771美元附近的20日均线，其次留意1783美元一线的日内低点区域；上方阻力位关注1787美元至1795美元区间，若突破并站稳，市场有机会向更高目标发起挑战，否则仍可能维持区间整理。

操作策略上，建议投资者以顺势交易为主，等待突破关键阻力后再考虑追多，避免在高位盲目加仓；若价格回踩1771美元附近获得支撑，可关注低吸机会。同时严格设置止损，控制仓位，在震荡行情中保持风险管理意识。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading around 1785.38, holding modestly above its 20-period simple moving average at 1771.22, which suggests that the short-term trend remains cautiously constructive despite the marginal 24-hour decline of 0.10%. The narrow session range between 1782.96 and 1787.18 reflects reduced volatility and a temporary balance between buyers and sellers. As long as price remains above the moving average, underlying momentum continues to favor gradual accumulation rather than aggressive selling.

Momentum signals offer a mixed but generally stable picture. The available MACD reading of 13.44458 remains positive, indicating that bullish momentum has not completely faded, although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. Likewise, the unavailable RSI prevents precise assessment of overbought or oversold conditions, encouraging traders to rely more heavily on price action and volume. Until additional confirmation appears, expectations should remain measured rather than overly optimistic.

The immediate support zone is located near the recent session low around 1783, with secondary support developing closer to the 20-period moving average near 1771. A sustained break beneath that average could expose further downside as short-term sentiment weakens. On the upside, resistance begins near the recent high around 1787, followed by the psychologically important 1800 level. A decisive close above resistance would strengthen the case for continued upward extension and attract additional momentum-driven buying interest.

From a trading perspective, patience is appropriate while price consolidates within this tight range. Conservative traders may prefer waiting for a confirmed breakout above resistance before considering fresh long positions, while more active participants could monitor pullbacks toward support for favorable risk-to-reward opportunities. Protective stop-loss orders remain essential because compressed trading ranges often precede larger directional moves. Position sizing should remain disciplined until momentum indicators and broader market participation provide stronger confirmation of the next sustained trend.
